creator: ymllds@hotmail.com
text:
It would certainly help to add a one line example of the output given
 by
 cat /dev/sndstat
 
 output when the sound card is installed, i.e., when you do _succeed_
 to get sound working.
 An example is given above.
 >FreeBSD Audio Driver (newpcm) Dec 28 2000 19:02:45
 >Installed devices:
 >pcm0: <AudioPCI ES1371> at io 0xc400 irq 11 (1p/1r channels duplex)
 
 In my case, I only get the first two lines
 >FreeBSD Audio Driver (newpcm) Dec 28 2000 19:02:45
 >Installed devices:
 
 (with a newer date for newpcm) and then did not know how to proceed.
 Of course I did not get a "pcm" line in dmesg either.
 I guess some IRQ conflicts, but have to check.
